name: research
description: Cost-aware multi-tier research router supporting web, neural, brief, and social query strategies.
capability_summary: Runs low-cost web search by default and escalates to specialized tiers when confidence requires deeper retrieval.

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Tier selector: auto, web, neural, brief, social.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results for retrieval tiers.

parameters.name: min_confidence
parameters.description: Escalation threshold for auto mode (0.0 to 1.0).

commands.name: search
commands.description: Run multi-tier search with optional auto escalation.
